ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c),
NOT($Permission.TableauAdmin), NOT($Profile.Name = "System Administrator"), NOT($Profile.Name = "Carmignac - System Administrator"), RecordType.DeveloperName = "Tableau_Request", OR(ISCHANGED(Priority), ISCHANGED(Delivery_Date_Estimate__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Only Tableau Admins can update the Priority and Estimated Delivery Date.
